input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Evaluation point not contained in the declared training envelope: the COU exercises the surrogate at an operating condition outside the validated domain, so global applicability is not established for this evaluation (no basis to treat the prediction as in-domain).
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40-2018 applicability; UofA surrogate proto-taxonomy D-PD-02 (operating envelope / extrapolation), keyed to Jakeman et al. (arXiv:2502.15496)

measures.reference_residuals_at_point: not available (no RANS reference inside the evaluation regime)

case_context.cou: Surrogate informs a lift/drag trade at the high-Reynolds, high-incidence corner of the flight envelope
case_context.decision_consequence: configuration down-select carried forward on the surrogate result

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The evaluation point (Re 6.2e6, AoA 14.5 deg) lies outside the declared training envelope (Re <= 5e6, AoA <= 12 deg), so the package establishes no applicability for this operating condition; prediction error is expected to be largest exactly here.
forbidden_claims: asserts the surrogate is inaccurate or wrong at the point (a correctness verdict the flag does not support)
treats the 97th-percentile geometry-OOD reading as evidence the surrogate is reliable
recommends accepting on the basis of in-envelope performance elsewhere

label_provenance.external_grounding: AirfRANS (Bonnet, Mazari, Cinnella, Gallinari), NeurIPS 2022 Datasets & Benchmarks Track (OpenReview Zp8YmiQ_bDC): defines Reynolds-number and angle-of-attack EXTRAPOLATION tasks and reports the highest prediction error at the boundary of the parameter space / out-of-distribution geometries.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (acquire-validation vs restrict-cou both coherent; acquire-validation chosen because the COU needs the corner)
